description: This image displays the logo of the European Environment Agency (EEA). The logo consists of a graphical element on the left and text on the right. The graphical element is a circular design, with the left half composed of eight green, leaf-like shapes arranged in a semi-circle, and the right half depicted as a blue cogwheel or gear. To the right of the graphical element, the text "European Environment Agency" is stacked in two lines, rendered in black, bold sans-serif typeface.
